overall.description: A static cinematic shot of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter video game, featuring students dining at long wooden tables beneath floating candles in a grand Gothic stone hall with warm ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from the center aisle, overlooking the house tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air beneath the vaulted stone ceiling, providing warm illumination
red and gold house banner with lion crest draped over the nearest central table
long wooden banquet table laden with food and dining ware, extending down the center aisle
tall Gothic stone columns lining the left side of the hall
tall Gothic stone columns lining the right side of the hall
tall arched windows with stone tracery allowing diffused natural light
tall arched windows with stone tracery allowing diffused natural light
large pointed arch doorway at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of the Great Hall's central aisle, with floating candles illuminating the Gothic stone architecture. Students in robes sit at long wooden house tables dining, while a Gryffindor banner hangs prominently on the nearest table. The scene is lit by a mix of candlelight and diffused natural light from tall arched windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of the Great Hall, capturing the atmospheric blend of Gothic grandeur and warm, magical illumination. It begins with a focused perspective of the central aisle, where floating candles cast a soft glow over the towering stone architecture. As the eye wanders across the space, the scene reveals students in robes dining at long wooden house tables, with a prominent Gryffindor banner marking the foreground. The lighting then balances the flickering candlelight with diffused natural light streaming through tall arched windows, grounding the magical setting in a serene, ambient glow.
